task_objective: Implement the custom autosync status strip visual refinement from docs/plans/custom_status_bar_ui.md.
tests_added: Updated tests/test_frontend_static.py::test_frontend_status_strip_matches_steamos_visual_contract to assert the bottom offset, centered group layout, Steam Blue normal color, warning needs_backup color, red error color, and absence of space-between layout.
design_decisions: The BrowserView strip is offset 48 CSS pixels above the absolute bottom edge.
The icon plus text are centered as one group while retaining the stable text-group width.
Running and success states use Steam Blue, needs_backup uses a warning/action color, and error remains red.
results: The targeted frontend static test failed first against the old implementation and then passed after the runtime update.
./run.sh pnpm run typecheck passed after the runtime update.
